name: 3Sync Closed Incidents
creator: 9378d367-2470-4d0f-acb4-2303f9927e59
description: This job will synchronize closed ServiceNow incidents and Google SecOps alerts. This job works with ServiceNow incidents that were ingested as alerts and also cases, which contains tag “ServiceNow” and “TICKET_ID” context value with Incident Number inside of it.
